text:
(In reply to Tobias from comment #2 (2016-10-15, not seen in Bugzilla since then))

I assume that this bug can be closed as either: 

a) overcome by events; or 

b) working as expected (from the attachments, I can't tell which kernel module, if any, was loaded for the NVIDIA Quadro K2100M). 

Thanks
